problems.question: (　　) did you spend your summer vacation?
problems.ja: 夏休みはどう過ごしましたか。
problems.en: How did you spend your summer vacation?

problems.question: How (　　) these trousers cost?
problems.ja: このズボンはいくらですか。
problems.en: How much do these trousers cost?

problems.question: "How (　　) do you go abroad each year?"  "Two or three times."
problems.ja: 「毎年どのくらいの頻度で海外に行きますか」「２，３回です」
problems.en: "How often do you go abroad each year?" "Two or three times."

problems.question: How (　　) is it from Osaka to Kyoto?
problems.ja: 大阪から京都まではどのくらいの距離ですか。
problems.en: How far is it from Osaka to Kyoto?

problems.question:
このホテルからその湖まで行くのにどのくらいかかりますか。
(how / hotel / to / it / from / take / this / go / does / long) to the lake?
problems.rawAnswer: How long does it take to go from this hotel
problems.ja: このホテルからその湖まで行くのにどのくらいかかりますか。
problems.answer: How long does it take to go from this hotel
problems.en: How long does it take to go from this hotel to the lake?

problems.question: How (　　) does the talk-show begin?
problems.ja: あとどれくらいでそのトークショーが始まりますか。
problems.en: How soon does the talk-show begin?

problems.question: I wonder (　　) between Osaka and Kanazawa.
problems.ja: 大阪から金沢まではどれくらいの距離があるのだろう。
problems.en: I wonder how far it is between Osaka and Kanazawa.

problems.question:
エリザベスは，100年前に生まれていたら，人生はどのように違っていたかについてよく考えたものだ。
Elisabeth would often think about (been / different / her life / how / if / would have) she had been born 100 years ago.
problems.rawAnswer: how different her life would have been if
problems.ja: エリザベスは，100年前に生まれていたら，人生はどのように違っていたかについてよく考えたものだ。
problems.answer: how different her life would have been if
problems.en: Elisabeth would often think about how different her life would have been if she had been born 100 years ago.

problems.question:
トムがいつニューヨークからパリに向けて出発するのか知りませんか。
(do / know / when / you / will / Tom / leave) New York for Paris?
problems.rawAnswer: Do you know when Tom will leave
problems.ja: トムがいつニューヨークからパリに向けて出発するのか知りませんか。
problems.answer: Do you know when Tom will leave
problems.en: Do you know when Tom will leave New York for Paris?

problems.question:
お酒は何からできていると思いますか。
(do / from / is / made/ sake / think / what / you)?
problems.rawAnswer: What do you think sake is made from
problems.ja: お酒は何からできていると思いますか。
problems.answer: What do you think sake is made from
problems.en: What do you think sake is made from?

problems.question: "Didn't you go there to see her yesterday?"　"(　　)  I met her there and we went to the party together."
problems.ja: 「昨日，彼女に会いにそこに行かなかったのですか」「いや，行きました。そこで彼女と会って，一緒にパーティーに出かけました」
problems.en: "Didn't you go there to see her yesterday?"　"Yes, I did. I met her there and we went to the party together."

problems.question: You're not the new student, (　　)?
problems.ja: あなたは新入生ではありませんよね。
problems.en: You're not the new student, are you?

problems.question: What he said is difficult to understand, (　　)?
problems.ja: 彼の言ったことは理解しにくいですよね。
problems.en: What he said is difficult to understand, isn't it?

problems.question: Let's go on a picnic, (　　)?
problems.ja: ピクニックに出かけましょうよ。
problems.en: Let's go on a picnic, shall we?

problems.question: There is a big dog in your garden, (　　)?
problems.ja: あなたの家の庭には大きな犬がいますよね。
problems.en: There is a big dog in your garden, isn't there?

problems.question:
君がどこで生まれたのかということは重要ではない。
It (importance / from / no / where / you / is / come / of).
problems.rawAnswer: is of no importance where you come from
problems.ja: 君がどこで生まれたのかということは重要ではない。
problems.answer: is of no importance where you come from
problems.en: It is of no importance where you come from.

problems.question:
この本を読めば，19世紀における教育がどのようなものであったかがわかる。（１語不要）
This book (was / what / like / education / us / how / shows) in the nineteenth century.
problems.rawAnswer: shows us what education was like（how不要）
problems.ja: この本を読めば，19世紀における教育がどのようなものであったかがわかる。（１語不要）
problems.answer: shows us what education was like
problems.en: This book shows us what education was like in the nineteenth century.

problems.question:
フランスに行くことを決めたときは，まだ海外生活とはどういうものかわからなかった。（１語不要）
When I decided to go to France, I had no idea (like / what / would / was / it / be) to live abroad.
problems.rawAnswer: what it would be like（was 不要）
problems.ja: フランスに行くことを決めたときは，まだ海外生活とはどういうものかわからなかった。（１語不要）
problems.en: When I decided to go to France, I had no idea what it would be like to live abroad.

problems.question:
授業で話し合った記事について，どう思いますか。（１語不要）
(article / how / the / you / what / do / that / about / think) we discussed in class?
problems.rawAnswer: What do you think about the article that（how不要）
problems.ja: 授業で話し合った記事について，どう思いますか。（１語不要）
problems.answer: What do you think about the article that
problems.en: What do you think about the article that we discussed in class?

problems.question:
母が買ってくれたマフラーはどうなったのだろうか。
I (become / bought / has / mother / my / of / scarf / the / what / wonder) for me.
problems.rawAnswer: wonder what has become of the scarf my mother bought
problems.ja: 母が買ってくれたマフラーはどうなったのだろうか。
problems.answer: wonder what has become of the scarf my mother bought
problems.en: I wonder what has become of the scarf my mother bought for me.

problems.question:
どうして昨日のパーティーに来なかったの。
How (not / did / come / you) join the party yesterday?
problems.ja: どうして昨日のパーティーに来なかったの。
problems.en: How come you did not join the party yesterday?

problems.question: (　　) did you come here today for?
problems.ja: 今日は何のためにこちらに来たのですか。
problems.en: What did you come here today for?

problems.question: "I don't know what this word means."　"Why (　　) you consult a dictionary?"
problems.ja: 「この単語の意味がわかりません」「辞書をひいてみたらどうですか」
problems.en: "I don't know what this word means."　"Why don't you consult a dictionary?"

problems.question:
一緒に映画を見に行きませんか。
(see / to / why / movie / we / go / don't / a)?
problems.rawAnswer: Why don't we go to see a movie
problems.ja: 一緒に映画を見に行きませんか。
problems.answer: Why don't we go to see a movie
problems.en: Why don't we go to see a movie?

problems.question: It's time for another meeting. What (　　) about this matter again tomorrow?
problems.ja: そろそろ別の会議の時間です。明日もう一度この件について話し合いませんか。
problems.en: It's time for another meeting. What about talking about this matter again tomorrow?

problems.question:
(　　) knows the trouble we have experienced?
＝Nobody knows the trouble we have experienced.
problems.ja:
私たちが経験した苦労をだれが知っているだろうか。
私たちが経験した苦労はだれも知らない。
problems.en: Who knows the trouble we have experienced?

problems.question:
そんなことをして何の役に立つのでしょうか。
(the / is / what / of / use) doing such a thing?
problems.ja: そんなことをして何の役に立つのでしょうか。
problems.en: What is the use of doing such a thing?
